name: ddd-tool
description: DDD Tool — Design Driven Development desktop app for visual flow-based software design

domains.name: App
domains.description: Application lifecycle: boot, routing between views, error handling

domains.name: Project Management
domains.description: CRUD for projects, domains, flows, and event wiring

domains.name: Flow Editor
domains.description: Flow canvas editing — nodes, connections, specs, undo/redo, save

domains.name: Canvas Views
domains.description: System Map (L1) and Domain Map (L2) visual navigation layers

domains.name: Git
domains.description: Git version control — status, staging, commit, clone, log

domains.name: Specs Sidebar
domains.description: Four-pillars sidebar: schema editor, UI page editor, infrastructure editor

domains.name: Validation
domains.description: Flow and project validation rules, quality gates, real-time indicators
